message:
test(scripting): property-based tests for storage and wasm_cache modules

Add 10 proptests for ExtensionStorage (encode/decode filename roundtrip,
encoded filename safety, validate_key bounds, safe_dirname invariants,
set/get roundtrip, extension isolation) and 6 proptests for ModuleCache
helpers (sha256 determinism/length/collision, hex_encode length/chars/
determinism).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
